description.short: Located in the heart of Banda Aceh, a city famed for its rich history and vibrant culture, Hotel Rasamala is an excellent choice for two travelers seeking comfort and convenience. The hotel offers newly refurbished rooms with air conditioning, complimentary Wi-Fi, and private balconies showcasing serene mountain or river views. Guests can enjoy a relaxing massage or start the day with breakfast served in-room. Its prime location near shopping hubs and restaurants, combined with tailored local tours, ensures a memorable and hassle-free stay in this captivating Indonesian destination. comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: I am very satisfied with my stay at this hotel. The staff is friendly and always ready to help. The room is clean, tidy, and comfortable for resting. The breakfast is delicious with a good variety of menu options. The location is also strategic, close to the city center and places to eat. Highly recommended!
comments.originalComment: Saya sangat puas dengan pengalaman menginap di hotel ini. Stafnya ramah dan selalu siap membantu. Kamar bersih, rapi, serta nyaman untuk beristirahat. Sarapan enak dengan variasi menu yang cukup. Lokasinya juga strategis, dekat dengan pusat kota dan tempat makan. Recommended sekali!

comments.reviewComments: This hotel has 2 elevators, the rooms are quite spacious, and the prices are affordable. But seriously, the staff is very friendly. At first, I got a room without windows even though I requested a room with a window on Agoda, so I went down and told the receptionist that I requested a room with a window, and they immediately changed my room. Also, the breakfast is delicious. Overall, it's the best!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
For the first time staying in Banda Aceh with my family, we chose Rasamala Hotel because of the reviews from Agoda and Google. And it turned out to be wow,... The staff was friendly, the facilities were complete, and it was close to the shopping center. It was truly a memorable and enjoyable experience. 

I hope the hotel continues to do well.
comments.originalComment:
Pertama kali menginap di Banda Aceh bersama keluarga, kami memilih hotel rasamala karena review juga dari agoda maupun google. Dan ternyata memang wow,... Petugas ramah dan fasilitas lengkap serta dekat dengan pusat perbelanjaan. Benar-benar pengalaman yang berkesan dan menyenangkan. 

Semoga lancar trus hotelnya.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
I had a pleasant stay at Rasamala Hotel, Aceh. The hotel itself is very nice, clean, and comfortable, making it a great place to relax after a long day.
One of the best things about this hotel is its strategic location. There are plenty of food options nearby, including restaurants and local stalls, so finding something to eat is very easy. There is also a convenience mart similar to 7-Eleven within walking distance. Additionally, a shopping mall is located just opposite the hotel, which can be easily reached on foot.
Overall, Rasamala Hotel offers great comfort and excellent convenience. Highly recommended for travelers looking for a comfortable stay with easy access to food and shopping. Recommended!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Hotel nya bersih dan yang penting dekat pusat perbelanjaan Suzuya, karena niat nya memang hanya ingin ke Suzuya dan mencari hotel paling dekat dengan Suzuya.. Akhirnya Rasamala Hotel pilihannya.. 

Mulai dari masuk staff nya sangat friendly, Kamar bersih dan semua perlengkapan dikamar mandi tersedia (Handuk, Sabun, Shampoo, Sikat Gigi) note : bagi yang tidak bawa perlengkapan mandi.

Kalau cuaca tidak memungkinkan utk keluar cari makan diluar bisa langsung ke Lt. 2 ada Cafe Resto "RumahCafe" Yang menu makan dan minumnya sangat lengkap. Suasana nya lumayan nyaman, Tenang, serasa punya Cafe pribadi 😁

Terimakasih Rasamala Hotel atas layanannya selama 3 hari 2 malam saya dan keluarga menginap disini 🙏
